scope: canonical rendering contract for all result-facing surfaces

surfaces.name: LIFF/mobile primary result screen
surfaces.purpose: Show the main result state immediately after completion.
surfaces.fallback_behavior: If teaser/share data is missing, show locked label + subtitle and a minimal recovery prompt; do not invent text.

surfaces.name: LIFF/mobile teaser result view
surfaces.purpose: Show a compact teaser for quick recognition and lightweight sharing.
surfaces.fallback_behavior: If teaser payload is absent, show the locked label and subtitle only, with no substitute copy generation.

surfaces.name: LIFF/mobile share-card entry state
surfaces.purpose: Prepare share-card entry and handoff to the share-card logic layer.
surfaces.fallback_behavior: If share-card payload is absent, disable sharing and keep teaser visible; do not synthesize share text.

surfaces.name: LIFF/mobile deep-report locked state
surfaces.purpose: Show that premium deep-report content exists but is not yet unlocked.
surfaces.fallback_behavior: If unlock metadata is missing, render the locked state with a neutral paywall prompt and no deep-report content.

surfaces.name: LIFF/mobile deep-report unlocked state
surfaces.purpose: Render premium deep-report content after valid unlock.
surfaces.fallback_behavior: If unlocked content is missing, fall back to locked state rather than inventing report prose.

surfaces.name: website secondary result explanation page
surfaces.purpose: Provide trust, explanation, SEO, and secondary result framing only.
surfaces.fallback_behavior: If rich payload fields are absent, show a minimal explanation page with locked label, subtitle, and static trust copy only.

state_model.name: loading
state_model.trigger: payload fetch in progress or initial render pending.

state_model.name: result_ready
state_model.trigger: persona_identity and at least teaser_payload are available.

state_model.name: teaser_only
state_model.trigger: teaser_payload is available but share/deep-report payload is incomplete.

state_model.name: share_card_ready
state_model.trigger: share_card_payload is available and rendering_guardrails allow share export.

state_model.name: deep_report_locked
state_model.trigger: deep_report_payload exists but unlock state is locked.

state_model.name: invalid_or_missing_payload
state_model.trigger: required payload fields are missing or malformed.

state_model.name: version_mismatch_guard
state_model.trigger: result_version or scoring_version does not match the expected contract.

state_model.name: anonymous_session_mode
state_model.trigger: no bound user account is present.

state_model.name: logged_in_bound_user_mode if applicable later
state_model.trigger: future account binding is available and verified.

screen_field_contract.result_label_display_rule: Display final_locked_label_jp exactly as locked; do not paraphrase.
screen_field_contract.subtitle_display_rule: Display final_locked_subtitle_jp exactly as locked; hotspot subtitles are mandatory when present.
screen_field_contract.teaser_text_display_rule: Use teaser_payload text only if available; otherwise omit teaser copy rather than inventing it.
screen_field_contract.dimension_signature_display_rule_or_conc: Show dimension signatures only when designed for an internal or explanatory surface; conceal by default on consumer result screens.
screen_field_contract.share_card_cta_rule: Show share CTA only when share_card_state is ready and share_card_payload is present.
screen_field_contract.deep_report_unlock_cta_rule: Show unlock CTA only when paywall_state and deep_report_unlock_state permit it.
screen_field_contract.next_action_progression_cta_placeholder_: Show a progression CTA placeholder if progression_state exists; do not simulate progression logic in the UI layer.
screen_field_contract.guardrails: Prevent alternate persona labels, subtitle mutation, and any text derived from non-locked naming sources.

non_override_rules: No rendering surface may invent alternate labels.
No rendering surface may override locked subtitle text.
No rendering surface may alter teaser, share-card, or deep-report source text without a new approved upstream document.
No website page may become the primary product surface.
No frontend contract may fork the result payload contract.
rendering_precedence_rules: canonical locked label and subtitle first
teaser/share/deep-report content only when payload and state allow it
fallback to safe minimal readout rather than invented copy
state_transition_summary: loading -> result_ready -> teaser_only/share_card_ready/deep_report_locked/deep_report_unlocked, with invalid/mismatch guards available at any point
future_handoff_note: payment may only toggle unlock state and entitlement, never persona structure or naming
